channel.title: Injection on bubka hacks stuff
channel.description: Recent content in Injection on bubka hacks stuff

item.title: Wazuh: SQL Injection Detection
item.description: SOC L1 investigation of a SQL Injection attack detected by Wazuh SIEM and Suricata IDS against DVWA

item.title: Wazuh: SQL Injection Detection
item.description: Detected a SQL Injection attack from Kali Linux against DVWA using sqlmap, observed 85 alerts across 6 rule IDs, and configured automated IP blocking via active response.
